entry.title: Blah Blah Blah
entry.summary:
Author: reveriery

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 643Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Summary: Jason is angry after watching Wuthering Heights. You are horny watching him get angry.Pairing: Jason Todd x fem!readerC/W: Wuthering Heights. Suggestive (making out, grinding(?))A/N: My first time really writing anything close to smut (or suggestive). So please, i know this isn't great, but we are starting somewhere. dividers:MDNI

entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,290Chapters: 6/45Kudos: 49

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. You were once an admirer of Fate; the idea of an inescapable future buried a sense of security within you. That was until fate decided it had other plans for you. Gosh... you hate being OMNISCIENT.

entry.title: Getting Around Gotham, or: Five Drabble Trysts with Batfam Men, and One 3500 Word Epilogue About How You All Realized It
entry.summary:
Author: gone (relocation)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 300Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 14

Summary: A fresh arrival in Gotham and trying to meet new people, you find yourself entangled with five different men, unaware that they are all connected, just as they are unaware of each other's connection to you, until you all end up at one party. (In your defence, they all had different surnames.) - Updating Mondays and Fridays- Inspired by every time I've thought "What if someone dated everyone in the Batfam, and never realized it because they all have different surnames?"- Written for the characters in general, most recently (but certainly not only) influenced by WFA- Only Jason got outright smut, sorry Dick et al.- Drabbles can pretty much be enjoyed separately, but they are meant to be read together with the longer epilogue.- Titled edited. Originally 3300 word epilogue but decide to go for a 3500 for a nice clean 4k total.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Come as a Lover, Come as an Exeuctioner
entry.summary:
Author: dalgikiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,991Chapters: 50/54Kudos: 365

Summary: [Jason Todd x fem!spoiled!girly!civilian!reader] you are a ghost as i am a ghost, but i am banging cabinets and tv static and all you’ve ever been is silent // in which Bruce's spoiled daughter is loved beyond measure and jason is unsure where he fits in a world that she isn't allowed to know exists. But he's has never been good at walking away from things that could break him.

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,738Chapters: 2/25Kudos: 37

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books.Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger or three as Red Hood. Said owner's moniker upgrades then from snarky tea shop owner to cute tea shop owner.Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off. Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood. Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.title: promise me this
entry.summary:
Author: emerald_lotus

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,647Chapters: 4/7Kudos: 64

Summary: Jason has succumbed to the classic trap: falling in love with his best friend. After a childhood on the streets of Gotham together and an incredibly fucked up life, he only falls deeper and harder until it's time to finally do something. But life keeps getting in the way and he has to decide what he’s willing to give up to be with her.

entry.title: Apartment 3B
entry.summary:
Author: ElaineInABox

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,339Chapters: 19/20Kudos: 918

Summary: You weren’t looking for love, just somewhere cheap, quiet, and safe enough to get you through the semester. Jason Todd wasn’t looking for company, just a roommate who wouldn’t ask questions about why he came home at two AM bloody and bruised.But in a cramped apartment in Crime Alley, between burnt coffee, leaky ceilings, and the soft hum of the city that never sleeps, the silence between you starts to change. What begins as survival becomes something quieter, steadier—something that almost feels like home.

entry.title: Attention
entry.summary:
Author: LicoricexWitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,007Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 174

Summary: You've always been obsessed with superheroes, ever since you were a little kid. You moved to Gotham all alone with stars in your eyes for undergrad before the cold reality of city-living set in. The streets were mean and people weren't as kind as they were back home. It was hard to make friends and you preferred to stay inside, making you even lonelier. You were a regular fish out of water, not a lot of close friends or family, living all alone--the perfect target for someone with not-so-nice intentions. They always said not to meet your heroes because they could never live up to your expectations. Or sometimes, they weren't a hero at all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
